hero.title: Professional Education, Bright Future
hero.description: Transform your career with the latest courses designed by industry professionals. Learn at your own pace and achieve your goals.

About.title: Master School – 10 Years of Experience, Hundreds of Successes!
About.description: For 10 years, Master School Education Center has been the address of quality, professionalism, and success in education...
About.achievementsTitle: We take pride in our achievements:
About.achievement1: In the last 6 years, we have been the first in the Republic in both Azerbaijani and Russian sections for master's programs.
About.achievement2: Also, we have won numerous first places in state service and doctoral programs.
About.slogan: Master School – the place where knowledge, effort, and success intersect.

Services.title: OUR SERVICES
Services.subtitle: WHAT WE OFFER
Services.description: We provide the best educational services to our students
Services.magistraturaDesc: Master's preparation is taught in 3 subjects: Logic, Informatics, Foreign Language. Each subject is taught twice a week for 90 minutes. On weekends, reward exams are held for students.
Services.governmentDesc: Held twice a week for 90 minutes. Trial exams are organized every weekend.
Services.miqDesc: Lessons are held twice a week for 1.5 hours. The first lesson is a free trial.
Services.abiturientDesc: Lessons are held twice a week for 1.5 hours. The first lesson is a free trial.
Services.preschoolDesc: Lessons are held twice a week for 1.5 hours. The first lesson is a free trial.
Services.ieltsDesc: Lessons are held twice a week for 1.5 hours. Speaking clubs are organized weekly and exams are held at the end of each month.

Team.title: Our Team
